mapper.select: SELECT c_user_type AS labelName, count(*) AS count FROM app_user WHERE c_created_time >=#{startDate} AND c_created_time <=#{endDate} GROUP BY c_user_type HAVING c_user_type IN (5 ,6)

select c_id as id, c_sex as sex, c_name as name, c_account as account, c_password as password, c_user_type as userType, c_mobile as mobile, c_email as email, c_status as status, c_creator_id as creatorId, c_created_time as createdTime, c_lock_type as lockType, c_lock_time as lockTime, c_update_pass_time as upPassTime, c_pass_error_cnt as passErrorCnt, c_tag1 as tag1, c_tag2 as tag2, c_showtype as showType, c_type as type, c_mac as mac, portraitImg, c_code as code , c_json as json from app_user a where c_id=#{id}

select c_id as id, c_sex as sex, c_name as name, c_account as account, c_password as password, c_user_type as userType, c_mobile as mobile, c_email as email, c_status as status, c_creator_id as creatorId, c_created_time as createdTime, c_lock_type as lockType, c_lock_time as lockTime, c_update_pass_time as upPassTime, c_pass_error_cnt as passErrorCnt, c_tag1 as tag1, c_tag2 as tag2, c_showtype as showType, c_type as type, c_mac as mac, portraitImg, c_code as code , c_json as json, SUM(b.score) as integeral from app_user as a LEFT JOIN app_integral as b on a.c_id = b.create_by where 1 = 1
and a.c_type = #{condition.type}
and a.c_user_type >= #{condition.userTypes}
and (a.c_type = #{condition.newType} or a.c_type = #{condition.newTypes})
and (a.c_name like concat('%',#{condition.searchText},'%') or a.c_account like concat('%',#{condition.searchText},'%'))
group by a.c_id
order by SUM(b.score) DESC
order by a.c_created_time DESC
mapper.insert: insert into app_user (C_ID,C_NAME,C_ACCOUNT,C_PASSWORD,C_USER_TYPE,C_MOBILE,C_EMAIL,C_STATUS,C_CREATOR_ID,C_CREATED_TIME,C_UPDATE_PASS_TIME,C_SHOWTYPE,C_TYPE,C_MAC,C_CODE, portraitImg, C_TAG1, C_TAG2) values (#{id},#{name}, #{account}, #{password}, #{userType}, #{mobile}, #{email}, #{status}, #{creatorId}, #{createdTime}, #{upPassTime},#{showType},#{type},#{mac},#{code}, #{portraitImg}, #{tag1}, #{tag2})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(C_ID) FROM app_user where c_account=#{account} AND ID != #{id}
select * from app_user WHERE c_status = 1 AND c_email != ''

select c_id as id, c_sex as sex, c_name as name, c_account as account, c_password as password, c_user_type as userType, c_mobile as mobile, c_email as email, c_status as status, c_creator_id as creatorId, c_created_time as createdTime, c_lock_type as lockType, c_lock_time as lockTime, c_update_pass_time as upPassTime, c_pass_error_cnt as passErrorCnt, c_tag1 as tag1, c_type as type, c_mac as mac, portraitImg, c_code as code from app_user a
where a.`c_account` like CONCAT('%',#{condition.account},'%')

select c_id as id, c_sex as sex, c_name as name, c_account as account, c_password as password, c_user_type as userType, c_mobile as mobile, c_email as email, c_status as status, c_creator_id as creatorId, c_created_time as createdTime, c_lock_type as lockType, c_lock_time as lockTime, c_update_pass_time as upPassTime, c_pass_error_cnt as passErrorCnt, c_tag1 as tag1, c_tag2 as tag2, c_json as json, c_type as type, c_showtype as showType, portraitImg, c_mac as mac, c_code as code from app_user where c_account = #{account}
SELECT * from app_user WHERE c_type = 2 AND c_status = 0
